Bash(curl -s -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n" --max-time 60 -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/nl-query -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"question":"give a comparison of chiller performance for the last 1 week"}')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='\\''python.exe'\\'' OR Name='\\''uvicorn.exe'\\''" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*main:app*'\\'' -or $_.CommandLine -like '\\''*uvicorn*main*'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, ParentProcessId, @{N='\\''Cmd'\\'';E={$_.CommandLine.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(120,$_.CommandLine.Length\)\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize')

PowerShell($pids = @\(14720, 27440, 2040\); foreach \($p in $pids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "killed $p" } catch { Write-Output "skip $p : $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $tcp = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($tcp\) { Write-Output "still listening on PID $\($tcp.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Output "port 8000 is free" })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Id 14720 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime; Write-Output "---"; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table LocalAddress, LocalPort, State, OwningProcess; Write-Output "---"; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://localhost:8000/api/v1/health -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).StatusCode)

Bash(curl -s -w "\\nHTTP %{http_code}\\n" --max-time 90 -X POST http://100.125.103.28:11434/api/generate -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"model":"qwen2.5:14b","prompt":"Reply with just: SELECT 1 FROM chiller_1_normalized LIMIT 1","stream":false,"options":{"num_predict":40,"temperature":0}}')

PowerShell($tcp = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($tcp\) { Stop-Process -Id $tcp.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "killed backend PID $\($tcp.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Output "no backend running" }; $tcp2 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($tcp2\) { Stop-Process -Id $tcp2.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "killed frontend PID $\($tcp2.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Output "no frontend running" }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3)

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($c in $conns\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } catch {} }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Write-Output "port 8000 cleared")

Bash(../.venv/Scripts/python -c "import main; print\('main:app imports OK — app =', type\(main.app\).__name__\)")
